requiredDocs: Signed DSC Certificate of Completion from a TDLR-approved driving safety course
Certified Texas Type 3A Driving Record from Texas DPS
Proof of payment of all court fines and fees
Valid Texas driver's license or photo ID
Proof of current liability auto insurance (covering driver at time of offense)
Copy of Texas Type 3A Certified Driving Record from the Texas Department of Public Safety
Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation (TDLR) Court Copy Certificate of Completion
Check or money order for court costs and administrative fees (for initial DSC request)
Valid Texas Class C Driver's License (copy)
Proof of current vehicle insurance / financial responsibility
DSC Certificate of Course Completion (signed, from a TDLR-approved provider)
Certified Type 3A Texas Driving Record (from Texas DPS)
Valid Texas Driver's License, permit, or Military ID
Proof of financial responsibility (insurance) — implied by standard TX procedure
Written request to take driving safety course (submitted on or before appearance date)
Signed affidavit for the driving safety course (sworn statement of eligibility)
Plea of guilty or no contest
Payment of court costs/reimbursement fee ($144 or $169)
DSC Uniform Certificate of Completion (Court Copy) — submitted after course
Certified Type 3A Driving Record from Texas DPS — submitted after course
Valid Texas Driver's License (or proof of active U.S. military service)
Proof of financial responsibility (auto insurance showing minimum required coverage)
Payment of applicable state costs and administrative DSC fee
Signed and notarized DSC Affidavit (Request Affidavit stating no DSC taken in prior 12 months)

Plea of Guilty or No Contest
DSC request/permission submitted on or before appearance date

Certified Type 3A Driving Record (from Texas DPS) — confirming no DSC taken in prior 12 months

DSC Completion Certificate (TDLR-approved course)
Completed Driving Safety Course Affidavit (Non-School Zone OR School Zone — whichever applies)
Copy of valid Texas Driver's License
Copy of current vehicle liability insurance (proof of financial responsibility)

DSC Certificate of Completion (submitted within 90-day window)
Completed DSC Request Application
Copy of current valid Texas Driver's License
Proof of financial responsibility / valid vehicle liability insurance (must be current, in your name, list you as a driver, or list the vehicle on the citation)
Court fee ($144 standard / $169 school zone) — paid only after court approval

Certified copy of driving record (Type 3A) from the Texas Department of Public Safety, bearing Texas DPS Seal

Proof of financial responsibility (insurance)

A legible copy of your valid Texas driver's license or permit

The 3A Certified Copy of your Driving Record from the Texas Department of Public Safety

Type 3A Texas Driving Record (from TX DPS)
Valid Texas Driver's License
Current proof of Texas liability insurance

Valid insurance card listing the defendant as a driver on the policy
Court costs remitted in the required amount ($144 standard / $169 school zone)
